nasb.text: It was given to her to clothe herself in fine linen, bright and clean; for the fine linen is the righteous acts of the saints.

esv.text: it was granted her to clothe herself with fine linen, bright and pure”— for the fine linen is the righteous deeds of the saints.

cnv.text: 並且有光潔的細麻衣， 賜給她穿上； 這細麻衣就是聖徒的義行。”

ccb.text: 获准穿上光亮洁白的细麻衣。”这细麻衣代表圣徒的义行。

csbs.text: 新娘被准许穿戴明亮洁白的细麻衣。” 原来，这细麻衣代表圣徒们的义行。
